full_text:
Huan Dian (Gongya)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huan Dian, styledGongya, was born in Pei. Noted for honesty and fine principles, a jingle was made about it. Became a close adviser to He Jin. Huan Dian was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Huan Dian lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
